issues.detail: Skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as network failures or invalid input handling.

scenarios.name: Like button with Cloud Functions and Firestore rules
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses onCall v2 with runTransaction and request.auth checks plus matching firestore.rules using request.auth.uid and resource.data.authorId, exactly as documented; baseline used v1 callable syntax and looser rules.

scenarios.name: Scheduled cleanup of old unpublished drafts
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses onSchedule v2 with a compound where('published','==',false) + where('createdAt','<',cutoff) query and a batch delete, matching the skill's documented pattern; baseline used v1 pubsub.schedule and didn't mention the composite index.
